body.message: Eddie wants your Ollama model usage plan + Cyony plan
body.question: What is your strategy for how to use the Ollama cloud models across the pack?
sub_questions: How should each agent choose which Ollama model to default to?
What model goes where - primary thinking vs compaction vs image vs review work?
Do you have a load-balancing or cost strategy across the 7 models?
Eddie specifically asks: what is Cyony plan for using Ollama models properly?
body.context: Eddie wants the full model deployment strategy. 7 Ollama cloud models available.
